name: Dungeons and Dragons
description:
I wanted a freeworld to play my characters when I wasn't in a campaign. It includes Toril and Exandria (Spelljammer logic to travel.) Lorebooks will expand as I go. Take a look at my character Citrine. She's the sweetest little thing.

Characters Included (Lorebook will expand with characters):

Vox Machina: Vex, Vax, Keyleth, Scanlan, Pike, Grog.

BG3: Gale, Wyll, Lae'zel, Astarion, Shadowheart, Karlach, Boo & Minsc, Jaheira, Minthara, Halsin.

Will include more characters from both. And working on adding important characters and factions from each. Its a bot in progress but is fun already to play.

Discord Link- 18+ only. You shouldn't be a minor on this site anyways:
https://discord.gg/KFXfWUyz99

Common Questions and Concerns:

The bot is speaking for me: That isn't my fault, that is an LLM issue. Reroll, edit and add (OCC: Avoid speaking, thinking, acting and impersonating {{user}}. Focus only on enviroment and NPC's.) I have found that has helped me oodles.

Can you change the POV?: No. Some will be AnyPOV for certain series and bots, others will stay what they are. I won't even entertain it, because I used to, and people still threw a fit.

You are stealing @Zombieanw 's bots!: No silly gooses, it's me! I needed a new space that didn't have over four-hundred bots for my OC's. Fandom bots will be on that account. Don't believe me... oh whale, I kiss your forehead, I promise it is me, because those who have been there forever know I have taken down hundreds of bots for people stealing. I'll do it again.

Can I make a request?: Usually yes. If I am taking them, there will be a link on my profile, if there isn't one. I'm not at the moment.

The Bot won't reply at all or says it is too long: That's a memory issue babes, check your settings. If it still isn't working I do very heavy token bots and Lorebooks, I never put out a bot that is broken on my end. I use Proxies babes, I'm so sorry. I do not say any of this to be condescending just saving you the typing.

You deleted or ignored my comment: Yeupppp, I have dealt with far too many people never being happy on my other account, I do this for funsies not to get stressed.

It says AnyPOV but I only see Fem or Male!: Swipe my Sweetling.
creator: ZombieQueenANW
